mapper.sql: id, external_key, slug, number_label, sort_order, featured, visible, publication_dirty, version
mapper.select: select from portfolio.project where id=#{projectId} for update
select from portfolio.project order by sort_order, id

choose.when: select pt.tag_id,pt.sort_order,t.normalized_key,tt.locale,tt.name from portfolio.project_tag pt join portfolio.tag t on t.id=pt.tag_id left join portfolio.tag_translation tt on tt.tag_id=t.id where pt.project_id=#{projectId} order by pt.sort_order,pt.tag_id,tt.locale

select ps.skill_id,ps.sort_order,s.normalized_key,st.locale,st.name from portfolio.project_skill ps join portfolio.skill s on s.id=ps.skill_id left join portfolio.skill_translation st on st.skill_id=s.id where ps.project_id=#{projectId} order by ps.sort_order,ps.skill_id,st.locale

select t.block_id,t.locale,t.title,t.description from portfolio.project_content_block_translation t join portfolio.project_content_block b on b.id=t.block_id where b.project_id=#{projectId} order by b.sort_order,t.locale

select m.block_id,m.media_asset_id,m.role,m.sort_order from portfolio.content_block_media m join portfolio.project_content_block b on b.id=m.block_id where b.project_id=#{projectId} order by b.sort_order,m.role,m.sort_order,m.media_asset_id

select t.block_id,t.locale,t.markdown from portfolio.content_block_markdown_translation t join portfolio.project_content_block b on b.id=t.block_id where b.project_id=#{projectId} order by b.sort_order,t.locale

select v.block_id,v.provider,v.url,v.cover_asset_id from portfolio.content_block_video v join portfolio.project_content_block b on b.id=v.block_id where b.project_id=#{projectId} order by b.sort_order

select c.block_id,c.code_text,c.language,c.show_line_numbers from portfolio.content_block_code c join portfolio.project_content_block b on b.id=c.block_id where b.project_id=#{projectId} order by b.sort_order

select q.block_id,q.locale,q.quote_text,q.source_text from portfolio.content_block_quote_translation q join portfolio.project_content_block b on b.id=q.block_id where b.project_id=#{projectId} order by b.sort_order,q.locale

select a.block_id,a.action_type,a.target_type,a.media_asset_id,a.url,a.open_new_tab from portfolio.content_block_action a join portfolio.project_content_block b on b.id=a.block_id where b.project_id=#{projectId} order by b.sort_order

select m.id,m.block_id,m.sort_order,m.numeric_value from portfolio.content_block_metric m join portfolio.project_content_block b on b.id=m.block_id where b.project_id=#{projectId} order by b.sort_order,m.sort_order,m.id

select t.metric_id,t.locale,t.label,t.value_text,t.suffix from portfolio.content_block_metric_translation t join portfolio.content_block_metric m on m.id=t.metric_id join portfolio.project_content_block b on b.id=m.block_id where b.project_id=#{projectId} order by b.sort_order,m.sort_order,t.locale

mapper.select: select id from portfolio.tag where id in #{id} order by id
select id from portfolio.skill where id in #{id} order by id
select id,project_id from portfolio.project_content_block where id in #{id} order by id
select m.id,b.project_id from portfolio.content_block_metric m join portfolio.project_content_block b on b.id=m.block_id where m.id in #{id} order by m.id

choose.when: delete from portfolio.project_translation where project_id=#{projectId}
delete from portfolio.project_tag where project_id=#{projectId}
delete from portfolio.project_skill where project_id=#{projectId}
delete from portfolio.project_media where project_id=#{projectId}
delete from portfolio.project_content_block where project_id=#{projectId}
delete from portfolio.project_content_block_translation where block_id in (select id from portfolio.project_content_block where project_id=#{projectId})
delete from portfolio.content_block_media where block_id in (select id from portfolio.project_content_block where project_id=#{projectId})
delete from portfolio.content_block_markdown_translation where block_id in (select id from portfolio.project_content_block where project_id=#{projectId})
delete from portfolio.content_block_video where block_id in (select id from portfolio.project_content_block where project_id=#{projectId})
delete from portfolio.content_block_code where block_id in (select id from portfolio.project_content_block where project_id=#{projectId})
delete from portfolio.content_block_quote_translation where block_id in (select id from portfolio.project_content_block where project_id=#{projectId})
delete from portfolio.content_block_action where block_id in (select id from portfolio.project_content_block where project_id=#{projectId})
delete from portfolio.content_block_metric where block_id in (select id from portfolio.project_content_block where project_id=#{projectId})

delete from portfolio.content_block_metric_translation where metric_id in (select m.id from portfolio.content_block_metric m join portfolio.project_content_block b on b.id=m.block_id where b.project_id=#{projectId})

insert into portfolio.project_translation(project_id,locale,status_label,eyebrow,title,summary,seo_title,seo_description) values (#{r.projectId},#{r.locale},#{r.statusLabel},#{r.eyebrow},#{r.title},#{r.summary},#{r.seoTitle},#{r.seoDescription})
insert into portfolio.project_tag(project_id,tag_id,sort_order) values (#{r.projectId},#{r.taxonomyId},#{r.sortOrder})
insert into portfolio.project_skill(project_id,skill_id,sort_order) values (#{r.projectId},#{r.taxonomyId},#{r.sortOrder})

insert into portfolio.project_media(project_id,media_asset_id,usage,sort_order,layout,object_position,credit,source_url) values (#{r.projectId},#{r.mediaAssetId},#{r.usage},#{r.sortOrder},#{r.layout},#{r.objectPosition},#{r.credit},#{r.sourceUrl})

insert into portfolio.project_content_block(id,project_id,block_type,sort_order,visible,width,alignment,emphasis,columns,version) values (#{r.id},#{r.projectId},#{r.blockType},#{r.sortOrder},#{r.visible},#{r.width},#{r.alignment},#{r.emphasis},#{r.columns},0)
insert into portfolio.project_content_block_translation(block_id,locale,title,description) values (#{r.blockId},#{r.locale},#{r.title},#{r.description})
insert into portfolio.content_block_media(block_id,media_asset_id,role,sort_order) values (#{r.blockId},#{r.mediaAssetId},#{r.role},#{r.sortOrder})
insert into portfolio.content_block_markdown_translation(block_id,locale,markdown) values (#{r.blockId},#{r.locale},#{r.markdown})
insert into portfolio.content_block_video(block_id,provider,url,cover_asset_id) values (#{r.blockId},#{r.provider},#{r.url},#{r.coverAssetId})
insert into portfolio.content_block_code(block_id,code_text,language,show_line_numbers) values (#{r.blockId},#{r.codeText},#{r.language},#{r.showLineNumbers})
insert into portfolio.content_block_quote_translation(block_id,locale,quote_text,source_text) values (#{r.blockId},#{r.locale},#{r.quoteText},#{r.sourceText})

insert into portfolio.content_block_action(block_id,action_type,target_type,media_asset_id,url,open_new_tab) values (#{r.blockId},#{r.actionType},#{r.targetType},#{r.mediaAssetId},#{r.url},#{r.openNewTab})
insert into portfolio.content_block_metric(id,block_id,sort_order,numeric_value) values (#{r.id},#{r.blockId},#{r.sortOrder},#{r.numericValue})
insert into portfolio.content_block_metric_translation(metric_id,locale,label,value_text,suffix) values (#{r.metricId},#{r.locale},#{r.label},#{r.valueText},#{r.suffix})

mapper.select: select id,sort_order from portfolio.project order by sort_order,id for update
mapper.update: with ranked as ( select id,row_number() over(order by sort_order,id)-1 as position from portfolio.project ) update portfolio.project p set sort_order=#{temporaryBase}+ranked.position::integer from ranked where p.id=ranked.id
